entries.title: Founder / Principal Consultant
bullets: Acted as a client-facing investment expert, articulating portfolio philosophy, asset allocation frameworks, and model portfolio construction methodologies to advisors and high-net-worth investors.
Partnered directly with financial advisors to understand client objectives, constraints, tax sensitivities, and risk tolerances to design tailored investment solutions.
Analyzed portfolios across asset classes for risk exposure, performance attribution, tax efficiency, and factor alignment.
Developed and delivered customized investment proposals, translating complex strategies into clear, actionable narratives.
Built model portfolios incorporating modern portfolio techniques including direct indexing concepts, tax-loss harvesting overlays, factor tilts, and optimization frameworks.
Provided clear client-ready reporting and investment commentary during periods of market volatility and macro uncertainty.

entries.title: Quantitative Researcher
bullets: Co-founded boutique data analytics and innovation-based consulting startup that focuses on global macro-based forecasting, quantitative finance & capital markets research using applied machine learning techniques.
Implemented time-series techniques based on 90% success rate in back-testing & value at risk reduction (market risk) calculations for stock price volatility.
Constructed optimized portfolio to maximize performance while controlling risk, draw-down and trading cost, while enhancing the scalability & flexibility of portfolio.
Quant Funds for family-office, top-down approach to business valuation with sectoral overview of how the market would function using predictive models.
Implemented backtesting frameworks for systematic trading strategies using event-driven simulation.

entries.title: Analytics Manager
bullets: Co-founded boutique data analytics and innovation-based consulting startup that focuses on global macro-based forecasting, quantitative finance & capital markets research using applied machine learning techniques.
Constructed optimized portfolio to maximize performance while controlling risk, draw-down and trading cost, while enhancing the scalability & flexibility of portfolio.
Quant Funds for family-office, top-down approach to business valuation with sectoral overview of how the market would function using predictive models
Created advanced analytics reports on market microstructure dynamics, volatility surfaces, and options pricing using Black-Scholes and Heston models.
